title: Neoh Gaussian-Splat Reconstruction
description: Turn 8+ overlapping property photos into a walkable 3D Gaussian splat (.splat). COLMAP poses + nerfstudio splatfacto (Apache-2.0) + PlayCanvas splat-transform (MIT). Pulls images from an S3 prefix or presigned URLs and writes the splat back to S3, a presigned PUT URL, or base64. All-commercial-OK licensing (no DUSt3R / INRIA-3DGS).

input.name: Training iterations
input.description: splatfacto iterations — quality vs. cost. 7000 is a good default for a house.

input.name: AWS region
input.description: Region of the recon S3 bucket. Only used in S3 mode.

input.name: AWS access key ID
input.description: Only for S3 image source/sink. Leave blank when using presigned URLs or base64.

input.name: AWS secret access key
input.description: Only for S3 image source/sink. Leave blank when using presigned URLs or base64.
